title: Testing Microservices Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on microservices testing patterns.

questions.question: Regarding microservices testing, what is the primary role of a 'Unit Test'?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To test each individual microservice—such as authentication or product services—in isolation

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a microservices-testing-based workflow?
options: Testing each individual microservice—such as authentication or product services—in isolation and then together
Recording a commit directly to the SQL server
Its only possible for SQL repositories
